home.communityDesc: Travel reports, group chats, insider tips and new travel friends – become part of the Urlaubfinder365 community.
home.seoTitle: Book package holidays & vacations at great prices – Urlaubfinder365
home.seoPara1: Urlaubfinder365 is your personal travel advisor for affordable package holidays, all-inclusive vacations and last-minute deals. We compare thousands of travel offers from reputable operators daily – so you always find the best price for your dream holiday.
home.seoPara2: Whether a beach holiday in Turkey, a cultural trip to Barcelona, relaxation in Mallorca or diving in Egypt – our offers cover the most popular destinations for German travellers. All prices include flights and accommodation for 2 people unless otherwise stated.
home.seoPara3: In addition to travel deals, you'll find free travel guides for top destinations: entry requirements, climate charts, packing lists and local insider tips – everything you need for a perfect holiday.
home.nlTitle: The best deals straight to your inbox
home.nlDesc: Weekly: the cheapest last-minute deals, early-bird offers and travel inspiration – free and unsubscribe anytime.
home.ctaDesc: Create a free account – save your favourite deals, bookmark destinations and receive personalised recommendations.

home.cockpitAiDesc: Your personal travel plan in seconds – Powered by Claude AI

hotelPage.heroSubtitle: Compare hotel prices from over 200 tour operators – updated daily, all categories, book directly with the operator.
hotelPage.currentOffersSubtitle: Live prices from over 200 operators – updated daily.
hotelPage.hotelTypesSubtitle: From beach resort to city hotel – find the perfect deal.
hotelPage.ratingCompassTitle: Rating Compass: What do hotel scores mean?
hotelPage.ratingCompassSubtitle: How to read hotel reviews correctly – and book the best hotel at the best price.
hotelPage.ratingCheckTitle: What should I look for in hotel reviews?
hotelPage.proTipTitle: Pro Tip: Recent reviews count more
hotelPage.proTipText: Hotels change – pay special attention to reviews from the last 6 months. A score of 8.5 with recent comments beats an old 9.0 with outdated feedback.
hotelPage.tipsSubtitle: How to book the best hotel at the best price.
hotelPage.faqTitle: Frequently Asked Questions About Hotel Search
hotelPage.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about booking hotels.
hotelPage.ctaTitle: Book Hotel + Flight as a Package?
hotelPage.ctaSubtitle: Package holidays are often cheaper than hotel and flight separately – compare and save now.
hotelPage.sidebarCtaText: Hotel + Flight as a package – often cheaper
hotelPage.tip1Text: Popular hotels in great locations sell out fast. Booking 3–6 months in advance gets you the best rooms at the best price.
hotelPage.tip2Text: 4-star hotels often offer more comfort than 5-star properties with outdated standards. It always pays to read the reviews.
hotelPage.tip3Text: Especially in Turkey and Egypt, all-inclusive is often barely more expensive than half board – and meals and drinks are included.
hotelPage.tip4Title: Direct beach access vs. shuttle service
hotelPage.tip4Text: Hotels with direct beach access cost more but save on expensive transfers. It's worth comparing at larger resorts.
hotelPage.tip5Text: For families, it's worth looking at kids' clubs, baby facilities and pool safety – these details are often only found in reviews.
hotelPage.tip6Text: Flexible rates cost a little more but offer free cancellation. If your plans are uncertain, this can save you a lot of money.
hotelPage.faq1Q: What is the difference between all-inclusive and half board?
hotelPage.faq1A: With half board (HB), breakfast and dinner are included. All-inclusive (AI) also includes lunch, snacks and drinks around the clock. For beach and pool holidays, AI is usually the better-value option.
hotelPage.faq2Q: Which hotel category is recommended for families?
hotelPage.faq2A: For families, clubs and resorts with childcare, water fun and family entertainment are ideal. 4-star properties often offer better value for money than 5-star luxury hotels.
hotelPage.faq3Q: How do I find the cheapest hotel?
hotelPage.faq3A: Our search tool compares thousands of hotel deals from over 200 operators every day. Simply enter your destination, dates and number of guests – results are sorted by price, and you book directly with the provider at no extra cost.
hotelPage.faq4A: Direct beach access means the hotel has its own access to the beach without crossing a road or public area. Hotels with direct beach access are more expensive but offer more comfort and safety for families.
hotelPage.faq5Q: Are the displayed prices per person or per room?
hotelPage.faq5A: Prices in our comparison are generally shown per person, including flight and transfer (package holiday). For hotel-only bookings, the price is shown per room per night.
hotelPage.faq6Q: Can I book hotels without a flight?
hotelPage.faq6A: Yes – through our hotel search you can find and book hotels as accommodation-only without a flight. Simply select 'Hotel Only' in the search form.

mietwagenPage.heroSubtitle: Compare all vehicle classes from over 100 providers – updated daily, book directly with the operator.
mietwagenPage.popularDestinationsSubtitle: Car rentals in over 200 countries – just enter the pick-up location in the search field.
mietwagenPage.insuranceGuideTitle: Car Rental Insurance: What does it all mean?
mietwagenPage.insuranceGuideSubtitle: These abbreviations are worth knowing – before you book and pay more than you need to.
mietwagenPage.licenseCheckTitle: 🪪 Driving Licence Quick Check: What do I need where?
mietwagenPage.licenseCheckSubtitle: In these countries your EU licence is enough – and where you need an international driving permit.
mietwagenPage.licenseAdacTip: Apply for an international driving permit at ADAC or DVR
mietwagenPage.licenseAdacTipText: Cost: approx. €15 · Valid: 3 years · Can be issued immediately at your local ADAC branch. Always present alongside your national EU driving licence.
mietwagenPage.sparTippsSubtitle: How to save on your next car hire and avoid common pitfalls.
mietwagenPage.faqTitle: Frequently Asked Questions About Car Rental
mietwagenPage.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about hiring a car – explained quickly.
mietwagenPage.ctaTitle: Also booking a flight or hotel?
mietwagenPage.ctaSubtitle: Combine car rental with flight and hotel – often cheaper than booking separately.
mietwagenPage.sidebarCtaText: Flight + Hotel + Car Rental as a package
mietwagenPage.tip1Text: Booking 4–8 weeks in advance can save you 30–40%. Especially in peak season in Majorca or Crete.
mietwagenPage.tip2Text: Always choose Full-to-Full: pick up the car with a full tank and return it full. Prepaid fuel options are usually more expensive.
mietwagenPage.tip3Text: Many cheap rates have high excess charges. Fully comprehensive cover without excess can save you hundreds of euros in the event of damage.
mietwagenPage.tip4Text: Almost all providers require a credit card (Visa/Mastercard) for the deposit – no debit cards, no cash.
mietwagenPage.tip5Text: Some providers charge up to €15/day for a second driver. Always factor this into your price comparison.
mietwagenPage.tip6Text: Extras at the counter are expensive. Book GPS in advance or use a navigation app – always reserve child seats ahead of time.
mietwagenPage.faq1Q: How old do you have to be to rent a car?
mietwagenPage.faq1A: The minimum age at most providers is 21, and sometimes 25 for larger vehicle classes. Drivers under 25 often pay a 'Young Driver' surcharge of €5–15/day.
mietwagenPage.faq2Q: What documents do I need for a car rental?
mietwagenPage.faq2A: Driving licence (at least 1 year old), passport or ID card, and a credit card in the main driver's name. For non-EU countries, an international driving permit is sometimes required.
mietwagenPage.faq3Q: What is included in the rental price?
mietwagenPage.faq3A: As a rule, third-party liability insurance, unlimited mileage and taxes are included. Fully comprehensive cover, theft protection and tyre protection often need to be booked separately – best to add these when booking.
mietwagenPage.faq4Q: Can I cancel the car rental for free?
mietwagenPage.faq4A: Most rates bookable through us are free to cancel up to 24–48 hours before pick-up. Look for the 'Free Cancellation' label on the rate when booking.
mietwagenPage.faq5Q: What is a deposit for a car rental?
mietwagenPage.faq5A: The deposit (€100–1,500) is blocked on your credit card and released after the car is returned without damage. It covers any potential damage or additional costs.
mietwagenPage.faq6Q: Can I return the car at a different location?
mietwagenPage.faq6A: One-way bookings (e.g. pick up in Rome, return in Florence) are possible but often come with an extra charge. During the booking process you can enter separate pick-up and drop-off locations.

werbepartnerPage.metaDesc: Reach hundreds of thousands of holidaymakers: advertising placements for local businesses & marketplace providers on Urlaubfinder365.de – transparent, flexible, measurable.
werbepartnerPage.heroDesc: Advertise exactly where holidaymakers are actively planning and booking – on Urlaubfinder365.de, Germany's up-and-coming travel portal for 200+ destinations.
werbepartnerPage.twoModelsSubtitle: How would you like to work with us?
werbepartnerPage.localPartnerDesc: For hotels, restaurants, activity providers and local businesses that want to book advertising space. You pay a transparent monthly fee – no commission or hidden costs.
werbepartnerPage.localFeature2: Ad placement on your chosen destination page
werbepartnerPage.marketplacePartnerDesc: For activity and experience providers who want to list their tours, courses or experiences directly in the marketplace. Listing is free – you only pay when a booking is made.
werbepartnerPage.packagesNote: Cancel monthly · GDPR-compliant · Direct link to your website

werbepartnerPage.faq1q: What is the difference between a local advertising partner and a marketplace provider?
werbepartnerPage.faq1a: Local advertising partners are businesses (hotels, restaurants, on-site tour providers) that book advertising space on Urlaubfinder365 for a fixed monthly fee. Marketplace providers list their activities and experiences directly in the marketplace and only pay when bookings are made (15% commission).
werbepartnerPage.faq2q: What is the minimum contract term?
werbepartnerPage.faq2a: All packages can be cancelled monthly. From 3 months you automatically receive a 5% discount, from 6 months 10%, and from 12 months 15%.
werbepartnerPage.faq3q: Can I choose the destination page for my advertising?
werbepartnerPage.faq3a: Yes – when booking you choose your target city, region or country. Your ad then appears exclusively on the relevant pages for that region.
werbepartnerPage.faq4q: How is the advertising labelled to be GDPR-compliant?
werbepartnerPage.faq4a: All sponsored content is clearly labelled with an "Advertisement" or "Sponsored" label. Billing is handled via Stripe, and our privacy policy ensures GDPR-compliant data processing.
werbepartnerPage.faq5q: What happens if there is no advertising active on my chosen destination page yet?
werbepartnerPage.faq5a: No problem – example placements are shown on all pages so you can see what your ad will look like. As the first advertising partner in a region, you benefit from 100% share of voice.
werbepartnerPage.contactPhone: Or call us on +49 (0)30 – example number
werbepartnerPage.sidebarDesc: Offer activities & experiences directly in the marketplace – list for free, 15% commission.

urlaubszielePage.heroTitle: Holiday destinations worldwide – book package holidays cheaply
urlaubszielePage.heroSubtitle: Compare cheap package holidays, all-inclusive & last-minute deals for over 200 destinations worldwide.
urlaubszielePage.faqSubtitle: Tips on booking, travel planning & more
urlaubszielePage.sidebarDescription: Compare thousands of offers daily – all-inclusive, last-minute & more.
urlaubszielePage.continentEuropaDesc: From the beaches of Mallorca to the alleys of Rome – Europe offers the perfect destination for every type of traveller. Package holidays {year} with flight & hotel at the best price.
urlaubszielePage.continentAsienDesc: Turkey, Thailand, Maldives, Dubai and Japan – from modern 5-star resorts on the Turkish Riviera to tropical beaches in the Indian Ocean.
urlaubszielePage.continentAfrikaDesc: Hurghada, Sharm el-Sheikh, Tunisia and Morocco – North Africa for beaches and culture, Kenya and Zanzibar for safari and dream beaches in the Indian Ocean.
urlaubszielePage.continentAmerikaDesc: Caribbean all-inclusive resorts in Punta Cana and Cancún, city trips to New York, Cuba's Havana and natural wonders along South America.
urlaubszielePage.continentAustralienDesc: The Great Barrier Reef, Sydney Opera House, New Zealand's fjords and the islands of the South Pacific – Australia and Oceania for unforgettable long-haul trips.
urlaubszielePage.faq1q: When is the cheapest time to book a package holiday?
urlaubszielePage.faq1a: The cheapest package holidays are often available with early-bird deals (8–12 months before departure) or as last-minute deals (0–14 days before departure). Travelling in the off-season – e.g. May/June or September/October – is usually significantly cheaper than in peak summer.
urlaubszielePage.faq2q: What is the difference between a package holiday and all-inclusive?
urlaubszielePage.faq2a: A package holiday combines flight and hotel into one total price. All-inclusive is a board type where meals and drinks are included. You can book a package holiday with various board options: room only, breakfast, half board or all-inclusive.
urlaubszielePage.faq3q: Which holiday destinations are suitable for families with children?
urlaubszielePage.faq3a: Particularly popular with families are Turkey (Antalya, Side), the Balearic Islands (Mallorca), Egypt (Hurghada) and Greece (Crete, Corfu). These destinations offer shallow beaches, child-friendly hotels with animation and short flight times.
urlaubszielePage.faq4q: How do I find the cheapest last-minute deals?
urlaubszielePage.faq4a: Last-minute deals arise when tour operators offer short-notice spare capacity at low prices. On Urlaubfinder365 you'll find daily updated deals. The best offers are often available 1–3 weeks before departure – flexibility on destination and airport increases your choices.
urlaubszielePage.faq5q: Which holiday destinations are recommended all year round?
urlaubszielePage.faq5a: Year-round destinations include the Canary Islands, Dubai/UAE, Thailand (outside the rainy season) and the Cape Verde Islands. For cultural trips, cities like Rome, Barcelona or Istanbul are suitable at any time of year.
urlaubszielePage.faq6q: Which destinations require a visa for German citizens?
urlaubszielePage.faq6a: Germans generally do not need a visa for travel within the EU as well as to Turkey, Egypt, Tunisia and Thailand. For the USA/Canada/Australia, an electronic travel authorisation (ESTA/ETA) is required. A visa is required for India and Vietnam.

urlaubsartenPage.overviewTitle: Holiday types – find your perfect holiday
urlaubsartenPage.overviewSubtitle: From relaxed package holidays and all-inclusive to spontaneous last-minute deals – find the travel style that suits you.
urlaubsartenPage.lifestyleSubtitle: Whether families, couples, singles or adventurers – discover the holiday world that fits your life.
urlaubsartenPage.tippsTitle: Travel tips for the perfect holiday
urlaubsartenPage.tippsSubtitle: With these tips you'll book smarter, save more and travel more relaxed.
urlaubsartenPage.sidebarDescription: Daily current offers – all-inclusive, last-minute & more.
urlaubsartenPage.art1Desc: Flight + hotel + transfer – all booked in one. No stress, no organisational effort.
urlaubsartenPage.art2Desc: Book early and save up to 40%. Secure the best rooms and cabins in advance.
urlaubsartenPage.art3Desc: Food, drinks and more – all included. Relax without constantly worrying about expenses.
urlaubsartenPage.art4Desc: Spontaneous and cheap – short-notice offers up to 14 days before departure with top discounts.
urlaubsartenPage.art5Desc: Depart within 72 hours – maximum savings for true spontaneous travellers.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp1Text: Those who are flexible with travel dates and departure airports often find much cheaper offers. Prices are frequently lowest on Wednesdays and Thursdays.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp2Text: Even for the same destination and hotel, prices can vary greatly between providers. Our comparison shows you all current offers daily.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp3Text: Early-bird discounts are largest 6–12 months before departure. Popular destinations like Mallorca or Turkey are booked up early in summer.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp4Text: Travel cancellation insurance protects against cancellation costs in case of illness, accident or job loss. Absolutely recommended, especially for expensive trips.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp5Text: Package holidays offer insolvency protection and complete organisation. Individual bookings require more planning but can sometimes be cheaper.
urlaubsartenPage.tipp6Text: Have a dream destination? Set a price alert and receive a notification when the price drops – so you never miss a bargain.
urlaubsartenPage.faq1q: What is the difference between a package holiday and an independent trip?
urlaubsartenPage.faq1a: With a package holiday, flight, hotel and often transfer are combined into one complete package. You book everything at once and have statutory insolvency protection. With an independent trip you book each component separately – more freedom, but more planning effort.
urlaubsartenPage.faq2a: All-inclusive is particularly worthwhile for families with children and for holidays in regions where food and drink are expensive. Those who want to stay at the hotel a lot and don't want the stress of budgeting on location benefit most.
urlaubsartenPage.faq3a: Last-minute offers are generally available 3–14 days before departure. Super last-minute goes even up to 72 hours before the flight. The more last-minute, the bigger the discount often is – but the selection also gets smaller.
urlaubsartenPage.faq4q: Is early booking really worth it?
urlaubsartenPage.faq4a: Yes – especially for popular summer destinations and peak travel times. Early birds secure the best rooms and cabins at the lowest prices. Studies show that the cheapest prices are often found 4–6 months before departure.
urlaubsartenPage.faq5q: Are package holidays safe if the operator becomes insolvent?
urlaubsartenPage.faq5a: Yes. Since the EU Package Travel Directive, package holidays are protected by a security bond. In the event of operator insolvency, travellers receive their money back or are brought home.
urlaubsartenPage.faq6q: Which holiday type is best for families with children?
urlaubsartenPage.faq6a: Package holidays with all-inclusive are ideal for families: no planning effort, fixed costs, entertainment programme on site. Many clubs have their own kids' clubs and pools – so parents and children relax at the same time.

urlaubsthemenPage.heroSubtitle: Whether a romantic adults-only holiday, family vacation with a kids' club or a luxury trip to a 5-star resort – here you'll find daily current offers for every holiday theme.
urlaubsthemenPage.themenGridSubtitle: Daily updated package holidays with flight, hotel and transfer – for every type of traveller.
urlaubsthemenPage.budgetSubtitle: Travel within your price range – including flight and hotel.
urlaubsthemenPage.seoTitle: Holiday themes – the right holiday for every type of traveller
urlaubsthemenPage.seoText1: Everyone travels differently – and that is exactly what our holiday themes reflect. Whether you're looking as a couple for a quiet break in an adults-only resort, want to go to a hotel with a kids' club with the family, or simply want to plan the cheapest beach holiday within your budget: at Urlaubfinder365 you'll find daily updated package holiday offers that perfectly match your wishes.
urlaubsthemenPage.seoText2: All displayed hotels have at least a minimum recommendation rate of 50% on HolidayCheck and have been curated by price-performance ratio. For luxury trips and honeymoons the bar is even higher – here we only show 5-star hotels with at least 90% recommendation rate. So you can be sure that your dream holiday will truly be unforgettable.
urlaubsthemenPage.seoText3: Use our budget filters to instantly find the cheapest trips within your price range – from cheap package holidays under €500 to premium trips up to €2,000 per person including flight and hotel. All offers can be booked securely directly with the tour operator.
urlaubsthemenPage.sidebarDescription: Discover over 250 destinations with current prices, guides and insider tips.

kreuzfahrtenPage.heroDesc: Compare over 30 cruise lines – ocean, river cruises, Caribbean, Mediterranean and more. Find the perfect cruise at the best price now.
kreuzfahrtenPage.typeHochseeDesc: The sea as your stage – from the Mediterranean to the Caribbean.
kreuzfahrtenPage.typeFlugDesc: All-in-one: flight, ship & cabin from a single source.
kreuzfahrtenPage.typeFlussDesc: Rhine, Danube, Nile & more – scenic river routes.
kreuzfahrtenPage.typeHotelDesc: Combo holiday: ship combined with hotel stay.
kreuzfahrtenPage.typeLuxusDesc: 5-star comfort at sea: suites, butler & gourmet.

kreuzfahrtenPage.kabinenDesc: From budget to luxury – find your ideal cabin category
kreuzfahrtenPage.kabineInnenDesc: Cheapest option – perfect for active holidaymakers who barely spend time in the cabin.
kreuzfahrtenPage.kabineAussenDesc: With window or porthole – daylight and sea views included.
kreuzfahrtenPage.kabineBalkonDesc: Private balcony with sea view – morning coffee with sunrise over the ocean.
kreuzfahrtenPage.kabineSuiteDesc: The finest on board – spacious suites with butler service and exclusive extras.
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoTipp1: Early-bird discounts: save up to 30% when booking 6–12 months ahead
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoTipp2: Last-minute: short-notice bargains from 4 weeks before departure
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoTipp3: Choose inside cabins for maximum savings
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoTipp4: Repositioning cruises for unusual routes at rock-bottom prices
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoTipp5: Cruise + flight packages are often cheaper than booking separately
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoFuerWenTitle: Who is a cruise suitable for?
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoFuerWen1: Couples: Romantic sunset on the balcony
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoFuerWen2: Families: Kids' clubs & action for every age
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoFuerWen3: Seniors: Comfort & pleasant atmosphere on board
kreuzfahrtenPage.seoFuerWen4: Solo travellers: Many lines offer single cabins
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqQ1: What is included in the cruise price?
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqA1: The base price includes cabin, full board (all main meals), entertainment and use of the ship's facilities. Not included: drinks, excursions, spa treatments and tips (depending on the cruise line).
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqA2: Short trips start from just 3–4 nights. Classic cruises last 7–14 nights. World voyages can last up to 100 days. River cruises are usually 7–15 nights.
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqQ3: Which cruise line is best for beginners?
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqA3: AIDA and TUI Cruises are particularly popular with German guests – German-speaking atmosphere, wide entertainment programme. MSC offers an international flair at affordable prices.
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqQ4: When should you book a cruise?
kreuzfahrtenPage.faqA4: Early bookers secure the best cabins and up to 30% discount when booking 6–12 months in advance. Last-minute deals are worthwhile for flexible travellers who can book at short notice.
kreuzfahrtenPage.ctaDesc: Over 30 cruise lines, thousands of routes – compare for free now and book the best cruise at the best price.

guenstigUrlaubPage.heroSubtitle: Daily updated package holidays, all-inclusive & last-minute deals – directly from the tour operator, no surcharges.
guenstigUrlaubPage.dealsSubtitle: Directly from over 200 tour operators – click an offer for instant booking.
guenstigUrlaubPage.lmDesc: Departure within the next 14 days: operators clear empty spots with up to 60% discount. Ideal for anyone flexible and wanting to travel spontaneously.
guenstigUrlaubPage.tuerkeiDesc: Turkey is one of the most popular holiday destinations for Germans – dream beaches, centuries-old history and generous all-inclusive resorts make it the price-performance champion.
guenstigUrlaubPage.spanienDesc: Spain combines Mediterranean beaches, vibrant nightlife and delicious cuisine – from the Balearics to the Canaries, a year-round holiday paradise in Europe.
guenstigUrlaubPage.griechenlandDesc: Greece offers over 6,000 islands, ancient history and turquoise waters – Crete, Rhodes, Corfu and Santorini are among the most popular destinations.
guenstigUrlaubPage.aegyptenDesc: Hurghada, Sharm el-Sheikh and Marsa Alam offer year-round sunshine, affordable all-inclusive resorts and the fascinating Red Sea with world-class dive sites.
guenstigUrlaubPage.kretaDesc: Crete's south coast offers secluded beaches and authentic villages, while the north attracts with family-friendly resorts and lively dining.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTippsTitle: 6 Money-Saving Tips for Your Next Holiday
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTippsSubtitle: Simple tricks to save real money on your next holiday.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp1Text: Comparing several departure airports pays off – a nearby airport is often significantly cheaper.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp2Text: If you're not tied to school holidays, you regularly save 30–50% compared to holiday prices.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp3Text: Popular destinations like Mallorca, Crete or Antalya are often 20–30% cheaper 6–12 months in advance.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp4Text: Short-notice trips (7–14 days ahead) are often heavily discounted as operators need to fill seats.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp5Text: When you factor in meals, snacks and drinks, all-inclusive is often cheaper than half-board plus extras.
guenstigUrlaubPage.sparTipp6Text: Operators get better purchase prices than individual travellers – packages are therefore often cheaper.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faqSubtitle: Everything about cheap booking and package holidays.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq1q: Why are package holidays often cheaper than individual bookings?
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq1a: Tour operators book flight seats and hotel rooms in large contingents at wholesale prices. They pass these savings on to customers – the result is a package cheaper than flight + hotel booked separately. Plus there's the statutory travel protection (insolvency insurance) that you don't automatically get with individual bookings.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq2a: The best last-minute prices are typically found 7 to 14 days before departure, when operators need to fill remaining spots. Particularly attractive are trips departing Thursday to Saturday. Important: you need flexibility on destination, departure airport and hotel category.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq3q: How do I find the cheapest price for my holiday?
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq3a: Our comparison tool above searches thousands of deals from over 200 tour operators daily. Simply enter your departure airport, travel period, duration and travellers – results are instantly sorted by price. There are no booking fees; you book directly with the operator.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq4q: When should I book an early-bird holiday?
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq4a: Early-bird offers are typically available 8 to 12 months before departure. The best prices for summer can therefore be found from October/November the year before. Early booking is especially worthwhile for popular destinations (Mallorca, Crete, Turkey) and during peak season July/August.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq5q: Are there hidden costs with package holidays?
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq5a: With reputable operators there are no hidden costs. The displayed price includes flight, transfer and hotel. Optional extras like car rental, excursions or beach loungers are transparently listed. During the booking process you see all costs summarised before you pay.
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq6q: What is the difference between all-inclusive and half-board?
guenstigUrlaubPage.faq6a: With half-board (HB) breakfast and dinner are included in the hotel price. All-inclusive (AI) additionally covers lunch, snacks, soft drinks and depending on the hotel, alcohol around the clock. For families or beach holiday types who rarely eat out, AI is almost always worth it.

flugsuchePage.heroSubtitle: Compare flight prices from over 200 airlines – updated daily, book directly with the provider.
flugsuchePage.topDestSubtitle: Top destinations with prices from Germany – updated daily.
flugsuchePage.baggageSubtitle: Hand luggage dimensions, free baggage and extra costs at a glance.
flugsuchePage.baggageDisclaimer: * Information without guarantee – tariffs change regularly. Please check with the provider before booking.
flugsuchePage.midBannerSubtitle: Find cheap flights, book directly with the provider — no detours.
flugsuchePage.airportGuideSubtitle: Getting there, parking and when to arrive.
flugsuchePage.climateSubtitle: When is the flight worth it and when do you save the most?
flugsuchePage.entryCheckSubtitle: Do I need a visa? The most important destinations at a glance.
flugsuchePage.sparTippsSubtitle: How to always find the cheapest flight.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp1Text: Tuesday and Wednesday are often the cheapest departure days. Friday and Sunday are regularly the most expensive.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp2Text: Frankfurt, Munich, Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Cologne – a neighbouring airport is often €50–100 cheaper.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp3Text: For popular summer destinations, booking 3–6 months in advance is worthwhile. Flight prices rise with demand.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp4Text: Set a price alert and book as soon as your desired price is reached – prices fluctuate daily.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp5Text: Flights with a stopover are often significantly cheaper than direct flights – ideal for long-haul travellers.
flugsuchePage.sparTipp6Text: Hand-luggage-only fares are cheaper – but checked baggage can be expensive later. Always compare.
flugsuchePage.faqSubtitle: Tips on booking, baggage and payment.
flugsuchePage.faq1a: Flights are generally cheapest on Tuesdays and Wednesdays as demand is lower. Outside school holidays and public holidays, prices are significantly lower. For summer flights, booking 3–6 months in advance is worthwhile.
flugsuchePage.faq2q: How do I find the cheapest flight?
flugsuchePage.faq2a: Our flight search tool compares thousands of offers from various airlines daily. Simply enter departure airport, destination, date and number of passengers – results are instantly sorted by price and you book directly with the provider.
flugsuchePage.faq3q: What is the difference between one-way and return flights?
flugsuchePage.faq3a: A one-way ticket is for one direction only. With some airlines and routes, booking two single tickets is cheaper than a return ticket. Our comparison automatically shows you the cheapest combination.
flugsuchePage.faq4q: How much luggage can I take?
flugsuchePage.faq4a: That depends on the fare and airline. Many budget airlines only allow free small hand luggage (approx. 40×20×25 cm). Larger cabin luggage and checked baggage cost extra – often €20–50 per leg.
flugsuchePage.faq5q: Can I rebook a package holiday flight ticket separately?
flugsuchePage.faq5a: With package holidays, the flight is tied to the hotel package and usually cannot be rebooked separately. Individually booked flights can be rebooked or refunded depending on the fare – often for a rebooking fee.
flugsuchePage.faq6q: What payment methods are common for flight bookings?
flugsuchePage.faq6a: Credit card (Visa/Mastercard), PayPal and direct debit are the most common payment methods. Note: some airlines charge credit card fees. Compare the total costs including all fees before completing your booking.
flugsuchePage.sidebarDesc: Cheap flights worldwide – daily updated prices, book directly.
